Text: RA 1 hour 10 min seems reasonable RE 1 day 8 hours reasonable variation RP 25 hours 1 hour suspiciously low STDEV AC 2 hours 1 hour very short missing steps EN 5 min 1 min extremely fast EC 1 hour 50 min reasonable PN 7 days 2 days very long NC 30 min 5 min reasonable
